pages.raw_text:
IT don't believe we need any adj
vice from the Spokesman-Review


as to how to conduct our fight with
the Washington Water Power COM
pany," said Business Agent Allen
of the Electrical Workers union in
referring to an editorial in that
paper this morning. "The public
will readily understand the friend


ly CD relations which exist be-
tween the editor of that paper and
the unions when it is understood
that he Is an expelled member of


the Typographical union. Union
men have less respect for him and
mis- editorials than they have for
the incompetents who are botching
the construction work of the Wash
ingtOn Water Power company at
the fair grounds. Speaking Of the
electrical workers | will say that
we will fight the Washington
Water Power company with every
legitimate weapon we can lay our
hands upon. We believe that Is
what everybody expects us to do"
